reviews.review_description:
My original one star review is below.  The devs actually fixed my issues pretty quick, so I am adjusting my review accordingly.  Now, my only issue is that some of the colors are pretty hard to distinguish quickly.  The blue, the white, and the green are very similar when viewed from afar.  Love the neon colors, but they should have a bit more color to them.  Also, there was no tutorial that I could find, and unless you have played this kind of game before, you wouldn't know how the scoring works.

Original review ....

This could have been kind of fun, but unfortunately there are game breaking bugs.  The first one is that if you shoot both left and right at the same time and your balls touch each other (lol) the game will completely freeze.  Also, for some reason you can move, and as soon as you move, you fall through the map.  Too late for me to refund since I bought it and forgot about it.  I will change my review if the dev fixes it.  Broken game made by a company called Broken Engineers.. You can't make this up.
